title: Neuroloma schugnanum
taxonomy: Neuroloma schugnanum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other flowering plants such as the Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae families. Gentianales is a part of the larger clade Asterids, which includes a wide range of flowering plant families.
